# external

## Concepts
- [firecrawl](firecrawl.md) -- Crawl service that returns rendered HTML, clean markdown, metadata, links, and a screenshot in one call; used for all deep-audit page fetches.
- [fireworks-api](fireworks-api.md) -- Serverless cloud inference fallback using GPT OSS 120B for heavy roles and GPT OSS 20B for light roles; Gemma-family Fireworks models are documented as on-demand only.
